description: Synthetic credential-free grounded-QA regression fixtures. Expected statements are scripted and do not constitute pilot or model-quality evidence.

sources.title: GQA ADR Local storage
sources.content:
# Local storage

Decision: Use SQLite for local metadata and jobs.
Reason: SQLite provides transactional recovery without operating another service.

sources.title: GQA ADR Messaging
sources.content:
# Control-plane messaging

Decision: Use NATS for control-plane messaging.
Reason: The workload is modest and NATS reduces broker operational complexity.

sources.title: GQA ADR Deployment
sources.content:
# Local deployment

Decision: Use Docker Compose for the local stack.
Reason: A single-machine deployment should not require Kubernetes cluster orchestration.

sources.title: GQA ADR Observability
sources.content:
# Observability

Decision: Use OpenTelemetry for traces and metrics.
Constraint: Source content and prompts must never become telemetry attributes.

sources.title: GQA ADR Authentication
sources.content:
# Authentication

Decision: Use OpenID Connect for user login.
Reason: OIDC integrates with identity providers and avoids storing user passwords.

queries.question: Why does local metadata use SQLite transactional recovery?

expected_statements.text: SQLite is used for local metadata because it provides transactional recovery without another service.

queries.question: Why does control-plane messaging use NATS operational complexity?

expected_statements.text: NATS was selected because the workload is modest and it reduces broker operational complexity.

queries.question: How do SQLite local metadata and Docker Compose support a single-machine local deployment?

expected_statements.text: SQLite and Docker Compose keep the local stack transactional while avoiding extra services and cluster orchestration.

queries.question: What operational simplicity principle connects SQLite metadata and NATS messaging?

expected_statements.text: The two decisions suggest a preference for components that reduce local operational overhead.

queries.question: What telemetry constraint applies to source content and prompts?

expected_statements.text: Source content and prompts must not become telemetry attributes.

queries.question: How do OIDC password avoidance and telemetry prompt exclusion reduce sensitive-data handling?

expected_statements.text: OIDC avoids storing passwords while the telemetry constraint prevents source content and prompts from entering attributes.

queries.question: Which quantum orchard algorithm schedules lunar robots?
